iterations.description: The user requests an enhancement to the main tab panel to optimize screen usage, drawing inspiration from modern browser tab implementations like Edge.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The user requests an enhancement to the main tab panel to optimize screen usage, drawing inspiration from modern browser tab implementations like Edge.
Approach: Investigate and implement UI adjustments to the WeifenLuo.WinFormsUI.Docking.DockPanel, potentially customizing `DockPaneStripNG.cs` to introduce features like dynamic tab sizing, vertical tabs, or other space-saving optimizations, to maximize screen real estate.
